name: find-myself
description: Native Tauri desktop shell for Find Myself

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run tauri:prepare && tauri dev --config desktop/tauri/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build: npm run tauri:prepare && tauri build --bundles app --config desktop/tauri/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build:windows: npm run tauri:prepare && tauri build --bundles nsis --config desktop/tauri/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
